allow: PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\("C:\\Users\\asus\\Desktop\\盛小峰.docx"\); $text = $doc.Content.Text; $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\); Write-Output "Word COM 可用，文档全文获取成功"; Write-Output "---"; $text)

PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\("C:\\Users\\asus\\Desktop\\盛小峰.docx"\); Write-Output "Tables: $\($doc.Tables.Count\)"; Write-Output "Shapes: $\($doc.Shapes.Count\)"; Write-Output "Paragraphs: $\($doc.Paragraphs.Count\)"; Write-Output "Sections: $\($doc.Sections.Count\)"; for \($i=1; $i -le $doc.Tables.Count; $i++\) { Write-Output "--- Table $i ---"; $table = $doc.Tables.Item\($i\); Write-Output "Rows: $\($table.Rows.Count\), Cols: $\($table.Columns.Count\)"; for \($r=1; $r -le $table.Rows.Count; $r++\) { $row = $table.Rows.Item\($r\); for \($c=1; $c -le $table.Columns.Count; $c++\) { $cellText = $row.Cells.Item\($c\).Range.Text; $cellText = $cellText -replace '\\r\\a', '' -replace '[\\x00-\\x1f]', ''; Write-Output "  [$r,$c]: $cellText" } } }; $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\))

PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\("C:\\Users\\asus\\Desktop\\盛小峰.docx"\); for \($i=1; $i -le $doc.Shapes.Count; $i++\) { $shape = $doc.Shapes.Item\($i\); Write-Output "--- Shape $i \(Type: $\($shape.Type\), Name: $\($shape.Name\)\) ---"; if \($shape.TextFrame.HasText -ne 0\) { $text = $shape.TextFrame.TextRange.Text; $text = $text -replace '[\\x00-\\x1f]+', '|'; Write-Output "Text: $text" } }; $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\))

PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\("C:\\Users\\asus\\Desktop\\盛小峰.docx"\); for \($i=1; $i -le $doc.Paragraphs.Count; $i++\) { $p = $doc.Paragraphs.Item\($i\); $text = $p.Range.Text; $text = $text -replace '\\r', '' -replace '\\a', ''; if \($text.Trim\(\) -ne ''\) { Write-Output "[P$i]: $text" } }; $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\))

PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\("C:\\Users\\asus\\Desktop\\盛小峰.docx"\); for \($i=1; $i -le $doc.Paragraphs.Count; $i++\) { $t = $doc.Paragraphs.Item\($i\).Range.Text -replace '\\r','' -replace '\\a',''; if \($t.Trim\(\)\) { Write-Output "[$i] $t" } }; $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\))
